title: Meta CAPI provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Meta Conversions API integration. Validated by MarketingProviderConfigObserver on create + update.

pixel_id.description: The Meta Pixel ID. 15-20 numeric characters.

access_token.description: The Meta CAPI access token. Generated in Meta Events Manager. Encrypted at rest.

test_event_code.description: Optional test event code. Format: TEST[0-9]+. Only used when test_mode=true on the provider_config. Meta shows these events in the Test Events tab of Events Manager.

action_source.description: Meta CAPI action_source parameter. Defaults to 'website' for browser-originated events; 'app' for mobile app; 'system_generated' for server-only events like subscription renewals.

data_processing_options.description: Meta CAPI data_processing_options. ['LDU'] enables Limited Data Use for California users (CCPA compliance). Empty/null = standard processing.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-request HTTP timeout for this provider's dispatches. Overrides the global marketing.dispatch.timeout_seconds.
